text: If someone throws a bag of trash at you, do you open it to prove it's not yours?
translation: 别人朝你扔了袋垃圾，你还要打开向他证明这垃圾不是你的？
rawContent: If someone throws a bag of trash at you, do you open it to prove it's not yours? || 别人朝你扔了袋垃圾，你还要打开向他证明这垃圾不是你的？

text: Just throw it back at his face.
translation: 直接砸回他脸上就行了。
rawContent: Just throw it back at his face. || 直接砸回他脸上就行了。
Or just walk away. || 或者直接走开。
You can try. || 可以试试。
But to correct one thing. || 不过纠正一点。
It's not shifting the blame. || 不是甩锅。

text: It was never your pot to begin with. Why catch it just to throw it back?
translation: 本来就不是你的锅 为什么要接过来再甩出去？
rawContent: It was never your pot to begin with. Why catch it just to throw it back? || 本来就不是你的锅 为什么要接过来再甩出去？

text: Just let him hold it himself.
rawContent: Just let him hold it himself. || 直接让他自己端着。

text: You're a law student, how did you get tangled up in this?
translation: 你一个学法律的 怎么在这上面绕进去了
rawContent: You're a law student, how did you get tangled up in this? || 你一个学法律的 怎么在这上面绕进去了
Whoever asserts must prove. || 谁主张 谁举证

text: If someone accuses you of stealing, you don't empty your pockets to prove your innocence.
translation: 别人说你偷东西 你不需要去翻口袋证明自己无辜
rawContent: If someone accuses you of stealing, you don't empty your pockets to prove your innocence. || 别人说你偷东西 你不需要去翻口袋证明自己无辜

text: You tell him to show the evidence.
translation: 你让他直接拿证据出来
rawContent: You tell him to show the evidence. || 你让他直接拿证据出来

text: If he can't, the case is dismissed.
translation: 拿不出 案子就不成立
rawContent: If he can't, the case is dismissed. || 拿不出 案子就不成立
This is 'letting him hold it'. || 这就叫让他自己端着

text: 可是实践上我还是容易被绕进去
所以我觉得我得多练习，多看看不同的情况
How do you want to practice?
rawContent: How do you want to practice? || 想怎么练

text: Use me as a sparring partner?
rawContent: Use me as a sparring partner? || 拿我当陪练？

text: I can't imitate those illogical people.
translation: 我可模仿不来那些毫无逻辑的发言
rawContent: I can't imitate those illogical people. || 我可模仿不来那些毫无逻辑的发言

text: Or next time you run into one, just send me a screenshot.
translation: 或者下次遇到这种人 直接截图发我
rawContent: Or next time you run into one, just send me a screenshot. || 或者下次遇到这种人 直接截图发我

text: I'll tell you how to shut them up.
rawContent: I'll tell you how to shut them up. || 我教你怎么让他闭嘴

text: 等你回我的时间我都被欺负完了！
教练哥哥...老公...导师哥哥....求求你啦...

replyTo.text: I can't imitate those illogical people.

rawContent: That's a lot of titles. || 称呼倒是不少。
Send the screenshots. || 截图发来。

text: Let's see how you got bullied.
rawContent: Let's see how you got bullied. || 看看怎么被欺负的。

text: 我都气急败坏把他们删了....
You deleted them but still managed to dig up ten.
rawContent: You deleted them but still managed to dig up ten. || 删了还能翻出来十张。
Let me look. || 我看看。
